title: OH MY GIRL Announces Delay In Group Comeback Plans
content:
OH MY GIRL’s WM Entertainment has shared an update regarding their full-group comeback plans. On June 22, WM Entertainment posted the following statement on their official social media accounts: Previously in February, WM Entertainment announced that OH MY GIRL is preparing for a six-member full-group comeback in a flexible way that goes beyond agency distinctions,… Continue reading OH MY GIRL Announces Delay In Group Comeback Plans
The post OH MY GIRL Announces Delay In Group Comeback Plans appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: OH MY GIRL回归计划推迟，WM娱乐发布官方声明
facts_list: WM娱乐于6月22日在官方社交媒体发布声明
声明称OH MY GIRL原定以6人完整体回归的计划将推迟
此前2月WM娱乐曾宣布组合将以超越所属社界限的灵活方式准备回归
summary_zh: WM娱乐于6月22日通过官方社交媒体发布声明，宣布OH MY GIRL的完整体回归计划将推迟。此前2月，WM娱乐曾表示组合正在以超越所属社界限的灵活方式准备6人完整体回归。

title: BIGBANG’s Daesung Denies Dating Rumors With KARA’s Hur Youngji
content:
BIGBANG’s Daesung and KARA’s Hur Youngji have denied dating rumors. Recently, dating rumors between the two surfaced when they were spotted appearing close at MAMAMOO’s concert. In response to the rumors, a source from Daesung’s agency R&D Company clarified, “They became closer after ‘ZIP DAESUNG,’ and they went to watch MAMAMOO’s concert together. They are… Continue reading BIGBANG’s Daesung Denies Dating Rumors With KARA’s Hur Youngji
The post BIGBANG’s Daesung Denies Dating Rumors With KARA’s Hur Youngji appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BIGBANG大声与KARA许龄智否认恋爱传闻
facts_list: BIGBANG成员大声与KARA成员许龄智被传恋爱传闻，因两人在MAMAMOO演唱会上表现亲密。
大声所属社R&D Company回应称：两人因《ZIP DAESUNG》节目变得亲近，并一同观看了MAMAMOO演唱会，否认恋爱关系。
summary_zh: BIGBANG成员大声与KARA成员许龄智近日被传恋爱传闻，起因是两人在MAMAMOO演唱会上被目击表现亲密。对此，大声所属社R&D Company回应澄清，两人因共同参与节目《ZIP DAESUNG》而变得亲近，并一起观看了MAMAMOO的演唱会，否认了恋爱传闻。

title: First K-pop, now K-books: Korea hopes its next big export is literature - The Korea Times
content: First K-pop, now K-books: Korea hopes its next big export is literature The Korea Times
title_zh: 继K-pop后，韩国希望文学成为下一个出口热点
facts_list: 韩国政府及出版界推动K-books（韩国文学）成为继K-pop后的新出口增长点
韩国文学翻译院等机构加大海外推广力度，包括资助翻译、参加国际书展
summary_zh: 据《韩国时报》报道，韩国正致力于将文学（K-books）打造为继K-pop之后的下一个主要文化出口产品。政府与出版界通过韩国文学翻译院等机构，加大翻译资助、国际书展参与等推广力度，以提升韩国文学在全球的影响力。

title_zh: Jennie与Tame Impala合作曲《Dracula》在Billboard电台及夏日歌曲榜创下新高

summary_zh: BLACKPINK成员Jennie与Tame Impala合作的《Dracula》混音版在美国电台持续升温。本周，该曲在Billboard Pop Airplay榜升至第6位，并在Songs Of The Summer榜单上创下新高，为两位歌手带来多项职业生涯新纪录。

The post CORTIS, aespa, LE SSERAFIM, Stray Kids, MEOVV, BTS, ILLIT, TXT, And More Sweep Top Spots On Billboard World Albums Chart appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: CORTIS、aespa、LE SSERAFIM、Stray Kids等横扫公告牌世界专辑榜
facts_list: 公告牌世界专辑榜6月20日周榜发布
CORTIS最新EP《GREENGREEN》在榜第六周重返第1名，同时《Billboard 200》前50名在榜第五周
CORTIS出道EP《COLOR OUTSIDE THE LINES》也上榜
aespa、LE SSERAFIM、Stray Kids、MEOVV、BTS、ILLIT、TXT等艺人占据榜单高位
summary_zh: 公告牌世界专辑榜6月20日周榜发布，CORTIS最新EP《GREENGREEN》在榜第六周重返第1名，同时该专辑在《Billboard 200》前50名在榜第五周。CORTIS出道EP《COLOR OUTSIDE THE LINES》也上榜。此外，aespa、LE SSERAFIM、Stray Kids、MEOVV、BTS、ILLIT、TXT等艺人占据榜单高位。
